mapper.insert: insert into VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT ( RECRUIT_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, VOLUNTEER_DATE, LOCATION, APPLY_DEADLINE, CREATE_DATE, STATUS, MEMBER_ID, THUMBNAIL_IMG ) VALUES ( SEQ_VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{content}, #{volunteerDate}, #{location}, #{applyDeadline}, SYSDATE, #{status}, #{memberId}, #{thumbnailImg} )
mapper.select: select RECRUIT_ID AS recruitId, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, VOLUNTEER_DATE AS volunteerDate, LOCATION AS location, APPLY_DEADLINE AS applyDeadline, CREATE_DATE AS createDate, STATUS AS status, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, THUMBNAIL_IMG AS thumbnailImg FROM VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT ORDER BY RECRUIT_ID DESC

select RECRUIT_ID AS recruitId, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, VOLUNTEER_DATE AS volunteerDate, LOCATION AS location, APPLY_DEADLINE AS applyDeadline, CREATE_DATE AS createDate, STATUS AS status, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, THUMBNAIL_IMG AS thumbnailImg from VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT where RECRUIT_ID =#{value}

SELECT VRD.RECRUIT_DETAIL_ID AS recruitDetailId, VRD.RECRUIT_ID AS recruitId, VRD.INTEREST_TYPE AS interestType, VRD.CAPACITY AS capacity, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VOLUNTEER_APPLY VA WHERE VA.RECRUIT_ID = VRD.RECRUIT_ID AND VA.INTEREST_TYPE = VRD.INTEREST_TYPE AND VA.STATUS = '승인' ) AS applyCount FROM VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT_DETAIL VRD WHERE VRD.RECRUIT_ID = #{recruitId} ORDER BY VRD.RECRUIT_DETAIL_ID
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_VOLUNTEER_APPLY.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO VOLUNTEER_APPLY ( VOLUNTEER_ID, MEMBER_ID, RECRUIT_ID, VOLUNTEER_DATE, INTEREST_TYPE, STATUS, APPLY_REASON, APPLY_DATE ) VALUES ( #{volunteerId}, #{memberId}, #{recruitId}, #{volunteerDate}, #{interestType}, #{status}, #{applyReason}, SYSDATE )

SELECT SEQ_VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT_DETAIL.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT_DETAIL ( RECRUIT_DETAIL_ID, RECRUIT_ID, INTEREST_TYPE, CAPACITY ) VALUES ( #{recruitDetailId}, #{recruitId}, #{interestType}, #{capacity} )
mapper.update: update VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, VOLUNTEER_DATE = #{volunteerDate, jdbcType=DATE}, LOCATION = #{location}, APPLY_DEADLINE = #{applyDeadline, jdbcType=DATE}, THUMBNAIL_IMG = #{thumbnailImg} WHERE RECRUIT_ID = #{recruitId}
UPDATE VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT SET STATUS = '모집마감' WHERE STATUS = '모집중' AND APPLY_DEADLINE < TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT VR.RECRUIT_ID FROM VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT VR JOIN ( SELECT RECRUIT_ID, SUM(CAPACITY) AS TOTAL_CAPACITY FROM VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT_DETAIL GROUP BY RECRUIT_ID ) D ON VR.RECRUIT_ID = D.RECRUIT_ID JOIN ( SELECT RECRUIT_ID, COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_APPLY FROM VOLUNTEER_APPLY WHERE STATUS = '승인' GROUP BY RECRUIT_ID ) A ON VR.RECRUIT_ID = A.RECRUIT_ID WHERE VR.STATUS = '모집중' AND A.TOTAL_APPLY >= D.TOTAL_CAPACITY
